title: teucrium luteum subsp. mesanidum
intro: Teucrium luteum subsp. mesanidum is a subspecies of the Teucrium luteum, a perennial herbaceous plant in the mint family, known for its yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues such as respiratory infections, wounds, and digestive problems. The medicinal properties of Teucrium luteum subsp. mesanidum have been associated with several health benefits, including the reduction of inflammation, improvement of respiratory function, and relief from pain and fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
